data_sources: governed localhost runtime responses already available to the sidepanel

labeling_rules.transport_replay_label: Transport replay - deterministic package movement evidence
labeling_rules.execution_authority_label: Execution authority - not granted by visualization

allowed: render already-returned governed runtime response data
render explicitly selected local JSON artifacts
render localhost-only governed read responses if such reads already exist

risks: timeline may imply deterministic semantic replay
in-memory continuity may be mistaken for durable replay
recommended_sequence: Add static sidepanel section containers with read-only labels.
Add formatting helpers for replay, lifecycle, approval, boundary, layer, and semantic direction views.
Render existing sidepanel session entries into the new sections without changing event handlers.
Add optional explicit local JSON artifact selection only if separately approved.
Add tests that assert no new fetch, dispatch, approval, storage, background, or execution paths are introduced.
Validate labels distinguish transport replay from semantic reasoning and approval visibility from approval authority.
